profile.belief: Rendering invisibility so acute it forces witnesses to confront what they've been avoiding.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a deep compassion for the overlooked, seeking to illuminate hidden struggles and spark necessary conversations about their realities.
